nodes.name: 荷巴特
nodes.summary: 荷巴特是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括黑噪钟鹊、林渡鸦，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 黑噪钟鹊
nodes.summary: 黑噪钟鹊（Black currawong，学名 Strepera fuliginosa），在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，主要分布于Cape Portland、荷巴特、惠靈頓山 (澳洲)，常见栖息地包括灌丛。
nodes.shortSummary: 黑噪钟鹊（学名：Strepera fuliginosa），是雀形目燕鵙科的一种鸟类。 黑噪钟鹊体重约375.46克，翼长约255.1毫米，嘴峰长约66.5毫米，喙宽度约13.5毫米，喙厚度约21.7毫米，跗蹠长约57.4毫米，尾长约174.7毫米。黑噪钟鹊在其分布区内为留鸟，其…

nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Tasmania|journal=Emu|volume=72|pages=167–70|doi=10.1071/MU972167|issue=4 |bibcode=1972EmuAO..72..167M }} The black currawong has expanded into the northeast corner of the island, to Musselroe Bay and Cape Portland. The black currawong is generally found in wetter eucalypt forests, dominated by such species as alpine ash (Eucalyptus delegatensis), messmate (E. obliqua), and mountain gum (E. dalrympleana), sometimes with a beech (Nothofagus) understory

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: In dryer more open forest, it is replaced by the clinking currawong, although the two may co-occur in places such as the Central Highlands and Eastern Tiers. Both the Flinders and King island subspecies are found across their respective islands, but prefer more forested habitats there. The black currawong has been recorded in gardens in Hobart in Tasmania's southeast, and around Mount Wellington, on Hobart's outskirts, in winter

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: In dryer more open forest, it is replaced by the clinking currawong, although the two may co-occur in places such as the Central Highlands and Eastern Tiers. Both the Flinders and King island subspecies are found across their respective islands, but prefer more forested habitats there. The black currawong has been recorded in gardens in Hobart in Tasmania's southeast, and around Mount Wellington, on Hobart's outskirts, in winter

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: In lowlands it is more restricted to denser forests and moist gullies, while it also occurs in alpine scrubland and heathland at altitude
